title: derris oligosperma
intro: Derris oligosperma, also known as the Derris plant, is a flowering plant native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Derris oligosperma include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions due to its medicinal properties.
